themes.name: Negative, Unreliable Trades and Transactions

quotes.text: It often feels like the moment I buy, the price starts going down.
the app lags almost 100% of the time during live trades, and the data is often inaccurate.
Crashing during trading and hanging in between order placement.
Today it crashed when I tried to exit from F&O and it doesn't load data.

themes.description: The app is experiencing frequent and severe issues with trades and transactions, including delayed and inaccurate data, technical failures, and incorrect executions. Users are frustrated with the high risk of losing their money due to these issues.
themes.business_impact: Significant financial losses for traders, damage to the company's reputation, and potential loss of customers due to mistrust
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Insufficient investment in infrastructure, poor maintenance of the app, and inadequate testing and quality assurance processes may be contributing to these issues
themes.action_plan:
• Conduct a thorough audit of the app's infrastructure and codebase to identify and fix underlying technical issues
• Implement robust testing and quality assurance processes to prevent future failures
• Invest in additional personnel and resources to improve maintenance and support

themes.name: [Negative] Unreasonably High Brokerage Charges

quotes.text: bro don't use this app for investment they charge tooooo much

themes.description: Users have reported consistently finding the brokerage charges to be exorbitantly high, leading to significant losses in their profit margins.
themes.business_impact: High brokerage charges can lead to increased losses in profit margins for users, potentially resulting in reduced user loyalty and increased churn.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The brokerage charges are likely calculated based on a flawed formula, leading to unexpected high charges. Alternatively, it might be due to hidden charges not disclosed properly to users.
themes.action_plan:
• Revise the brokerage charge calculation formula to ensure it is more transparent and reasonable. Disclose any additional charges clearly during the onboarding process
• Conduct a thorough review of the current charge structure and fees to identify areas for improvement. Consider implementing a tiered charge structure based on user activity
• Enhance product education to clearly communicate to users the potential impact of high brokerage charges on their investments.
